prompt.gpt-image: the subject remains perfectly sharp while pedestrians, vehicles, and the distant background exhibit subtle natural motion blur, creating an authentic candid street photography look

label.th: Shallow DOF + การเคลื่อนไหว

prompt.gpt-image: tack sharp subject with shallow depth of field, combined with subtle environmental motion blur in the background for a realistic cinematic photograph

label.th: ยาว Exposure ถนน

prompt.gpt-image: slight long exposure effect where the environment shows gentle motion streaks while the subject remains completely sharp, realistic handheld street photography

label.th: Foreground การเคลื่อนไหว เบลอ

prompt.gpt-image: soft foreground motion blur created by passing pedestrians or nearby objects while the subject remains perfectly sharp and unobstructed, adding depth and realism

label.th: Edge การเคลื่อนไหว เบลอ
